semantic_text: kitsu: In case meta.count is 0 onDeadEntry should be invoked
kitsu: Fixed test which should check for multiple studios
core: Further prevent duplicates in studios and producers by comparing end of one string with the start of another
core: Moved createShuffledList from ListExtension to CollectionExtension
analyzer: Add KoverIgnore annotation to Options enum
kitsu: Fixed throwing error when the 'included' property ist missing
core: Moved createShuffledList from ListExtension to CollectionExtension

Changed pictures to only show a pictogram instead of text
